name: Chocolate Peanutbutter Bar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine 2 tablespoons of black coffee or water and 1 tablespoon of chunky peanut butter. Mix until the peanut butter is softened.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (1 package Chocolate Alba, 3/4 oz Uncooked Old Fashioned Oats, and 2 tablespoons Raisins) to the bowl. Stir thoroughly until a stiff but sticky mixture forms.
3. Place the mixture on a sheet of wax paper or plastic wrap.
4. Using your hands, press the mixture into a log that is about 5 inches long and 1 1/2 inches wide.
5. Wrap the log tightly in the wax paper.
6. Freeze overnight.
Makes 1 serving. EACH SERVING: 1 Protein (P), 1 Carb (B), 1 Fats (FAT), 1 Fruit (FRUIT), 1 Milk (302 Calories).
